runs.note: Migrated from OAuth implicit flow to authorization code flow with PKCE. Changed response_type to 'code', implemented PKCE code verifier/challenge generation using S256 method, added state parameter for CSRF protection, and updated handleCallback to exchange authorization code for tokens instead of extracting from URL fragment. All security vulnerabilities from implicit flow are now resolved.
